title: Must we recreate everything for each new board/project?
excerpt: Each time I create a new board or project, I find myself having to recreate the Status labels, the Automations, the Groups. For 20+ boards and to have to do this for each new one is quite tedious. Is the solution to this…

posts.author: adamboettiger (Adam Boettiger)
posts.cookedHtml: Each time I create a new board or project, I find myself having to recreate the Status labels, the Automations, the Groups. For 20+ boards and to have to do this for each new one is quite tedious. Is the solution to this for me to create a single board custom template and start with that every time? Are automations saved with a board template?

posts.author: weareborg (Kenneth Killeen)
posts.cookedHtml: Make a good template and then duplicate board and updates. It will carry everything over.
